state_vector.interpretation: Input mapped as force geometry rather than waste.

mirror_lines: If you freeze inside this state, your available movement shrinks.
The cost is not moral failure but a reduction of acting power.
causal_mirror.predicted_subject_cost: Further narrowing of inner movement and reduction of available next steps.
causal_mirror.predicted_continuity_effect: Continuity becomes thinner and more fragmented if collapse is treated as final truth.

laetitia_index.interpretation: Laetitia measures whether the dyad gained acting power, continuity, participation, and recoverable form.

scm_handoff.continuity_hook: схлопывание, открытое в мыслимый следующий ход
